title: ADVOCACY SERVICES - 211info
text: IONE ADVOCACY CENTER ADVOCACY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides restraining order petition assistance, and help going to hospitals and court. 365 W 3rd Street Ione, OR 97843 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic, sexual, or dating violence and/or stalking Hours: Tuesday 9:30am-3:30pm by appointment only (541) 276-3322 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 276-3322 Hotline (800) 833-1161 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow County SITE HOURS: 1st and 3rd Tuesday of the month Services: Crime Victim Accompaniment Services Protective/Restraining Orders Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CLASSES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - TRAINING WORKSHOPS MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IONE ADVOCACY CENTER
